message:
fix(security): add path validation to backup recovery and cleanup warnings

Security fixes:
- Add null byte validation to backup_id
- Add validate_restore_paths() to prevent path traversal attacks
- Validate backup source stays within backup_dir
- Validate recovery destination stays within ms_root or config_path
- Add comprehensive security tests for path validation

Code cleanup:
- Remove unused fetch_git_repo function in sync/engine.rs
- Fix deprecated chrono APIs (use DateTime::from_timestamp)
- Fix unused import (NaiveDateTime)
- Fix unused assignment warning in testing/steps.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
